symptom_vector: Pod killed, forceful pod termination, container killed, pod eviction

expert_knowledge.root_cause_desc: Component [paymentservice-1] experienced [pod_processes] fault, accompanied by [client_error, client_error_ratio, error, error_ratio, request, response] anomalies.
reasoning_chain: Step 1: Check Metadata - Confirm faulty component is [paymentservice-1] (From Ground Truth instance field)
Step 2: Check Observation - Found keyword [checkoutservice, emailservice, frontend, productcatalogservice, shippingservice] in Trace (From GT key_observations: request_proportion_anomalies)
Step 3: Check Observation - Found keyword [request, response] in Metric (From GT key_observations)
Step 4: Check Observation - Found keyword [pod_processes] in Metric (From GT key_observations)
Step 5: Derive Root Cause - Based on above features, determined cause is [pod_processes] termination (From Ground Truth key_metrics)

critical_checks.expected_pattern: These services appear in trace analysis as affected downstream services with request proportion anomalies
critical_checks.instruction: Search for trace data showing request proportion anomalies involving services: checkoutservice, emailservice, frontend, productcatalogservice, shippingservice

critical_checks.expected_pattern: Request and response metrics show anomalies during fault period
critical_checks.instruction: Check metric data for anomalies in request and response metrics during 2025-06-09T07:10:38Z to 2025-06-09T07:10:39Z

critical_checks.expected_pattern: pod_processes metric drops from 1.0 to 0.0 indicating pod termination
critical_checks.instruction: Verify pod_processes metric for paymentservice-1 shows drop from normal value to 0.0 during fault window
